title: Answer My Call

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: When darkness falls and troubles rise
May heaven hear your desperate cries
From sacred halls, may help descend
And strength from Zion be your friend

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Every prayer that leaves your lips
Every offering from fingertips
May they rise like morning light
Remembered in the holy height

sections.label: Chorus
lines: May God answer when you call
Raise you up each time you fall
Like a banner in the wind
Let His name protect and win
We will rise, we will stand
In the power of His hand
(We will rise, we will stand
In the power of His hand)

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Some trust in chariots made of steel
Some count on weapons they can feel
But we will trust a higher name
Above all powers that earth can claim

sections.label: Bridge
lines: Now I know with certainty
Victory flows from sovereignty
Every plea for help we raise
Returns as glory, turns to praise

sections.label: Final Chorus
lines: May God answer when you call
Raise you up each time you fall
Like a banner in the wind
Let His name protect and win
We will rise, we will stand
In the power of His hand

sections.label: Outro
lines: O Lord, deliver when we cry
O King, answer from on high

epigraph: he will hear him from his holy heaven with the saving strength of his right
